acceptedAnswer.text: Report now with doctor link—delays ok if proven[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, if linked to incident—report ASAP with medical proof.** Utah allows for delayed onset[1]. **Key factors:** Doctor causation opinion critical. **Practical guidance:** Report retroactively explaining delay, get eval soon. Don't ignore. **Delayed claims viable with evidence.**
